items.title: This Is Your Stoic Duty
items.author: Daily Stoic
items.content:
We’re trying to come together and feed THREE MILLION people! Rather than give in to the materialism and selfishness of Cyber Monday, we’re teaming with Feeding America to contribute to something larger than ourselves. Every dollar we raise provides 10 meals to those who need it. Donate here today: https://dailystoic.com/feeding
